_schema_notes.coverage: Authoritative schema for all DID formats — DD Form 1664 (pre-2014) and free-text (post-2014 MIL-STD-963C)
_schema_notes.did_format: Set to 'dd_form_1664' or 'free_text'. Determines which fields are expected to be populated.
_schema_notes.963c_compliant: True if the DID was prepared under MIL-STD-963C (2014 or later). False for older DIDs.
_schema_notes.reserved_fields: Fields marked RESERVED are present in one format but not the other. Always include them — set to empty string or empty array when not applicable.
_schema_notes.preparation_instructions: Official MIL-STD-963C name for what was previously called 'requirements'. Contains the numbered sections of the DID. All section numbers are normalized to strictly numeric dot-notation (1, 1.1, 1.1.1). Letter-based source numbering (2.a, 3.1.b) is converted to numeric equivalents (2.1, 3.1.2).
_schema_notes.asterisk: True if the requirement number is followed by * in the source document (conditional requirement).

title: Source Control Document Approval Request
summary: This Data Item Description outlines the format and content for Source Control Document Approval Requests, enabling the Government to approve or disapprove the use of specific source control documents for selected equipment items.
use_relationship:
The Source Control Document Approval Request provides the Government with a means for approving or disapproving the use of source control documents for specific items selected for use in the equipment.
This Data Item Description (DID) contains the format and content preparation instructions for a Source Control Document Approval Request resulting from the work task described by 5.13.2 of MIL-STD-31000.
This DID is intended for use in data acquisitions requiring Source Control Documents which the Government may use for future procurements.
This DID supersedes DI-SESS-81010E and is related to DI-SESS-81000F, "Product Engineering Design Data and Associated Lists" and DI-MISC-80071E, “Parts Approval Requests”.
distribution_statement: DISTRIBUTION STATEMENT A: Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited.

preparation_instructions.title: Reference documents.
preparation_instructions.content: The applicable issue of the documents cited herein, including their approval dates and dates of any applicable amendments, notices, and revisions, shall be as specified in the contract.

preparation_instructions.title: General.
preparation_instructions.content: Source Control Document Approval Requests shall meet the requirements of MIL-STD-31000.

preparation_instructions.title: Format.
preparation_instructions.content: Source Control Document Approval Requests shall be in the contractor's format.

preparation_instructions.title: Content. The request shall specify the following:

children.title: Nomenclature and description of the item.
The critical application(s) for which the item is to be used.
Number of applications per end item.
Item status as a repair part.
System performance requirements requiring source qualification.
Procedures and criteria required to qualify a source.
Sources of supply and manufacturers' part numbers.
Estimated cost of the item involved.
Estimated cost and time to qualify a source.
Impact on contract cost, schedule and performance if use of Source Control Document for documenting the item is not permitted.
Copy of the approved non-standard part approval request, if the DoD Parts Control Program is applicable under the contract or purchase order.
